pr.title: feat: ContentPilot - AI Content Creation Assistant (SoPilot-inspired)
pr.body:
## Summary

Full implementation of **ContentPilot**, an AI-powered content creation web app inspired by [SoPilot](https://sopilot.net/), focused on content creation with bilingual support (English & Bahasa Indonesia).

### Features:
- **Landing Page** — Hero section, feature cards, CTA, footer (similar to SoPilot's layout)
- **AI Chat** — Real-time streaming chat with an OpenAI-compatible API, quick prompt buttons for Blog/Tweet/Instagram/LinkedIn
- **Column-Based Content Creation** — Create content columns with positioning, generate topics, and produce drafts (mirrors SoPilot's content workflow)
- **Content Templates** — Blog Post, Tweet Thread, Instagram Caption, LinkedIn Post, Newsletter, TikTok Script
- **Bilingual UI** — Full EN/ID language toggle in navbar, all UI strings translated
- **Custom API Configuration** — Settings page for base URL, API key, and model (supports OpenAI, Groq, Ollama, OpenRouter, etc.)
- **Dark/Light Theme** — Toggle via navbar
- **Responsive Design** — Mobile-friendly with collapsible nav

### Tech Stack:
- Next.js 16 (App Router, Turbopack)
- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
- lucide-react icons, next-themes
- localStorage for settings & columns persistence

## Review & Testing Checklist for Human

- [ ] Run `npm install && npm run dev` and verify the landing page loads at `http://localhost:3000`
- [ ] Go to Settings, enter your API credentials (e.g. OpenAI, Groq, or Ollama), click "Test Connection"
- [ ] Open AI Chat, send a message and verify streaming response works
- [ ] Toggle language (EN/ID) in navbar and confirm all UI text changes
- [ ] Go to Content Creation, use a template to create a column, generate topics and drafts
- [ ] Toggle dark/light theme and verify UI looks correct in both modes

### Notes
- All data (API settings, columns) is stored in `localStorage` — no backend database required
- The `/api/chat` route acts as a proxy to the configured OpenAI-compatible API, supporting SSE streaming
- Deploy locally with `npm run dev` or `npm run build && npm start`


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8fc7e30c5a6543d8aef8ed81385daf74
Requested by: @kelenagi
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
